title: Ability to alphabetize folder content
excerpt: I user Folders to separate customer meeting notes, meaning I’m creating a new Subfolder per customer in my primary “Customers” folder. Every time I add a new Subfolder to this primary Folder, I have to manually drag/drop…

posts.author: marcusdiddle (Marcus Diddle)
posts.cookedHtml: I user Folders to separate customer meeting notes, meaning I’m creating a new Subfolder per customer in my primary “Customers” folder. Every time I add a new Subfolder to this primary Folder, I have to manually drag/drop in order to keep this primary Folder sorted alphabetically. The drag/drop process, while easy, is a bit cumbersome. When you attempt to rearrange these Subfolders by dragging them, the other Subfolders immediately expand open as you move the item you’re dragging across them. It’s a battle to get your Subfolder placed where you want it due to all of the other folders immediately expanding themselves. Allowing me to simply tap … on the primary Folder and set some sort options (Alphabetical, Date Created, etc) would be incredibly useful.
